1.title: Kafka Consumer - Assigned Partitions
1.query:
timeseries assigned_partitions = avg(kafka.consumer.consumer-metrics.assigned-partitions),
  by: { dt.entity.kafka:consumer }
| fieldsAdd kafka:consumer_name = entityName(dt.entity.kafka:consumer)
| sort arrayAvg(assigned_partitions) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Kafka Consumer - Bytes consumed rate
2.query:
timeseries bytes_consumed_rate = avg(kafka.consumer.consumer-metrics.bytes-consumed-rate),
  by: { dt.entity.kafka:consumer }
| fieldsAdd kafka:consumer_name = entityName(dt.entity.kafka:consumer)
| sort arrayAvg(bytes_consumed_rate) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Kafka Consumer - Fetch latency
